description: AI-generated raster assets accepted into the AssetsGen variant. Every file has a .provenance.json sidecar (provider, model, prompt, seed, request id). 3D models, SFX, music, and the intro video carry sidecars too but are outside this raster manifest's scope.

integration.role: menu backdrop poster for the intro video, object-fit cover
tileable map on buildable board tiles (repeat 1 per tile)
tileable map on path tiles (repeat 1 per tile)
tileable map on the terrain plane (repeat 26)
